title: callista fragrans
intro: Callista fragrans, also known as the beautybush or fragrant beautybush, is a flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Callista fragrans include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Callista fragrans include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and reduce inflammation in the body. Callista fragrans can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
